title: Koanophyllon iteophyllum
taxonomy: Koanophyllon iteophyllum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Koanophyllon, which is a group of plants native to Mexico. The plant is further classified as part of the tribe Eupatorieae within the Asteraceae family. Koanophyllon iteophyllum is a relatively rare species and its classification is largely based on botanical studies. Further research is needed to confirm its exact classification within the plant kingdom.
uses: Koanophyllon iteophyllum is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. Its extracts have been found to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities.
